summary: Tested TWO NEW features in Bulk Category Editor: (1) Quick Push Save - green 'Save Now' button that immediately saves a single attribute to scoped products, (2) Scope Preview - inline preview showing which value goes to how many products. Both features are VERIFIED WORKING. Also verified Preview & Apply flow has no regressions.

minor.note: Unrelated to the features being tested

console_warnings.message: Encountered two children with the same key 'bathroom' and 'kitchen'
Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Quick Save button (data-testid='quick-save-filter-{slug}' and 'quick-save-spec-{slug}') renders correctly with green styling
VERIFIED: Quick Save button shows 'Saving...' with spinner during save operation
VERIFIED: Quick Save button is hidden when no values are selected (Style spec had 0 selected, no Save Now button shown)
VERIFIED: Scope Preview (data-testid='scope-preview-spec-{slug}' and 'scope-preview-filter-{slug}') shows value → count badges
VERIFIED: Scope Preview shows scoped values with purple/blue border and unscoped (default) values with gray background
VERIFIED: Quick Save triggers toast 'Thickness saved to 50 products' and 'Material saved to 50 products'
VERIFIED: Preview & Apply flow still works - shows 'Preview Changes (Dry Run)' dialog with all changes listed
VERIFIED: Force Save button is present in the editor

success_rate.backend: N/A (Quick Save uses existing bulk-update-unified endpoint)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Canopy supplier products (246 products) with restored draft
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Push Save and Scope Preview features are VERIFIED WORKING. Quick Save button appears next to attribute rows with selected values, shows loading state during save, and triggers success toast. Scope Preview shows inline badges with value → count when per-value scopes are active. The Preview & Apply flow has no regressions.

details: Green 'Save Now' button appears next to attribute rows with selected values
Button shows 'Saving...' with spinner during operation
Success toast appears: 'Thickness saved to 50 products', 'Material saved to 50 products'
Button is hidden when no values are selected (verified with Style spec)
Found 10 Quick Save buttons in Filters section, 6 in Specifications section
Found 3 Scope Preview elements in Specifications section
Scoped values show purple/blue border, default values show gray background with '(default)' label
Preview Changes (Dry Run) dialog opens correctly
Shows '17 attributes will be modified across 50 products'
Lists all changes: Categories, Color, Room, Suitability, Thickness, Slip Rating, Features
Force Save button is present in the editor

ui_verification.scope_preview_visible: PASS - 3 elements with value → count badges
ui_verification.save_now_hidden_when_no_values: PASS - Style spec had no Save Now button
